emails.subject: reference
emails.body: I thought it would be wise to broaden my horizons up here by applying to be licensed in the State of Nebraska. Can I put you down as a client/reference? By the way, what should I put down as your current occupation? Maria

emails.subject: RE: reference
emails.body: RE: reference Absolutely! Currently, my title is "Director Customer Service Initiatives (I think?), Marketing, Transwestern Pipeline Company". To: Donoho, Lindy

emails.subject: RE: reference
emails.body: Thanks a bunch. They wanted to know 2 clients and you were the first that came to mind and definitely my most favorite. I will really miss working with you. You are so efficient, easy going, smart, kind, helpful, etc. the list goes on and on. Take care, Maria To: Pavlou, Maria
